claim: C4-B CLEAN-ADDITIVE HOLDS: checkpoint restore uses INSERT OR REPLACE preserving snapshot columns incl. id (checkpoints.ts:1896-1900 from SELECT * snapshot :1499) - not reassignment, so weight_history.edge_id linkage survives. weight_history is the only schema FK (vector-index-schema.ts:1423); derived_id TEXT UNIQUE collides with nothing.

question: Q10
claim: PRECISION FIX: causal_edges.id is INTEGER PRIMARY KEY = rowid ALIAS, NOT AUTOINCREMENT (vector-index-schema.ts:1108 vs weight_history AUTOINCREMENT :1422); prior iters said 'autoincrement PK' - correct to 'rowid-alias PK' (rowids reusable after delete; irrelevant to restore). 027-internal quirk: search-results.ts:528 joins ce.edge_id but causal_edges has no edge_id column (CTE-alias).
